tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All parameters except HbA1c are within normal limits. The elevated HbA1c (6.3%) indicates impaired glucose metabolism, consistent with prediabetes or early diabetes. Recommend clinical correlation and consideration of further evaluation or intervention for glycemic control. No evidence of renal or electrolyte disturbances.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
